description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular green lawn with several trees surrounding the property. The house features a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The structure is divided into distinct sections, with visible open-plan living areas, bedrooms, and what appears to be a pool or patio area in the backyard. The exterior is predominantly white with some glass and metallic accents, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a few scattered trees and a well-maintained grassy yard. The house is designed for comfort and style, with outdoor seating and recreational areas visible from multiple angles.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist lawn with scattered trees. The design emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and sleek, contemporary finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a spacious lawn with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard area, including a pool or patio and more of the open-plan interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor seating area, additional windows, and the division of the house into separate sections.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the relationship between the house, pool/patio, and surrounding trees, emphasizing the modern layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, minimal steps, and no porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
